headlines.description: Enner Valencia's two first-half goals led Ecuador to a dominant 2-0 victory over Qatar on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ecuador beat hosts Qatar as World Cup begins

headlines.description: — When Bukayo Saka and Marcus Rashford last walked off the field at a major international soccer tournament, they were bombarded with racist abuse.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saka, Rashford help England rout Iran 6-2 at World Cup

headlines.description: — Louis van Gaal's gambles at both ends of the field paid off for the Netherlands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands strikes late to beat Senegal 2-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: The United States and Wales battled to a hard-fought, physical 1-1 draw in the teams' World Cup Group B opener in Qatar on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: US draw with Wales after late Bale penalty

headlines.description: — Saudi Arabia scored one of the biggest World Cup upsets ever by beating Lionel Messi’s Argentina 2-1 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: World Cup stunner: Saudi Arabia beats Messi's Argentina 2-1

headlines.description: Substitute Andreas Cornelius hit the post and Denmark had a late penalty appeal turned down in a goalless draw with Tunisia at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Denmark held to drab draw by Tunisia at WC

headlines.description: Poland's Robert Lewandowski missed a penalty -- and his chance to finally claim a World Cup tournament goal -- in a 0-0 draw with Mexico.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ochoa stops Lewy PK in Mexico-Poland stalemate

headlines.description: — France showed it can cope without its star striker at the <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Giroud, Mbappe help France beat Australia 4-1 at World Cup

headlines.description: Croatia, runners-up at the last World Cup, were held to a 0-0 draw by Morocco at the Al Bayt Stadium on Wednesday in their opening Group F match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia held to goalless draw by Morocco

headlines.description: — Another World Cup day, another World Cup shock.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan gets 2 late goals to upset Germany 2-1 at World Cup

headlines.description: — Spain’s young squad got off to a high-scoring start at the World Cup, routing Costa Rica 7-0 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Young Spain squad routs Costa Rica 7-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: A moment of brilliance from Michy Batshuayi handed Belgium a narrow 1-0 win over Canada in their World Cup Group F game at Ahmad bin Ali Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Courtois busy as Belgium hang on to beat Canada

headlines.description: An apologetic Breel Embolo scored the winner against the country of his birth to hand Switzerland a 1-0 victory over Cameroon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Apologetic Embolo gives Swiss win vs. Cameroon

headlines.description: Uruguay and South Korea cancelled each other out in their Group H opener as Diego Godin and Fede Valverde both hit the post.
headlines.shortLinkText: Uruguay, S. Korea cancel each other out at WC

headlines.description: Portugal got their World Cup campaign up and running with a 3-2 win against Ghana thanks to quick-fire goals from Joao Felix and Rafael Leao.
headlines.shortLinkText: Portugal edge five-goal thriller against Ghana

headlines.description: — With Neymar limping off the field with an ankle injury, Richarlison came through for the “Seleção.”
headlines.shortLinkText: Richarlison's goals help Brazil beat Serbia 2-0 at World Cup

headlines.description: — Rouzbeh Cheshmi scored in the eighth minute of second-half stoppage time to break a scoreless stalemate and Iran went on to defeat Wales 2-0 at the World Cup on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cheshmi's late goal sends Iran to 2-0 win over Wales

headlines.description: Senegal strikers Boulaye Dia, Famara Diedhiou and Bamba Dieng scored to secure a deserved 3-1 victory over Qatar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Qatar near World Cup exit in Senegal loss

headlines.description: Netherlands were held to a 1-1 draw against Ecuador in their World Cup Group A clash on Friday, eliminating hosts Qatar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ecuador hit back to grab draw vs. Netherlands

headlines.description: The United States were dominant in attack but could not find a way past England as they were held to a 0-0 draw in their second 2022 World Cup game.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT dominant in draw to England at World Cup

headlines.description: Mitchell Duke's winner helped Australia beat Tunisia 1-0 at the Al Janoub Stadium on Saturday to seal their first World Cup victory in 12 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia edge Tunisia for 1st WC win since '10

headlines.description: — Finally!
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski scores at World Cup, Poland beats Saudis 2-0

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe netted twice to help Didier Deschamps' side to a 2-1 win over Denmark in their World Cup Group D clash on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe double sends France to WC last 16

headlines.description: Lionel Messi rescued Argentina from the brink of World Cup elimination, scoring the crucial opening goal in a 2-0 win over Mexico on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi leads Argentina to vital win over Mexico

headlines.description: Japan missed the chance to advance to the World Cup last 16 after Keysher Fuller's goal 10 minutes from time gave Costa Rica a surprise 1-0 win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Costa Rica shock Japan with late Fuller winner

headlines.description: — A bit of trash talk meant to inspire Canada instead motivated Croatia.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia downs Canada 4-1 at World Cup on Kramaric's 2 goals

headlines.description: Canada have been knocked out of the 2022 World Cup in Qatar after suffering a 4-1 defeat to Croatia on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Canada exit World Cup in defeat to Croatia

headlines.description: Niclas Fullkrug salvaged a point for Germany in a 1-1 draw with Spain to keep the four-time World Cup champions hopes of advancing from alive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Germany draw with Spain on late Fullkrug strike

headlines.description: Cameroon's Vincent Aboubakar came off the bench to rescue a 3-3 draw with Serbia, a result that kept both sides' slim World Cup chances alive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cameroon, Serbia share spoils in six-goal thriller

headlines.description: Ghana beat South Korea 3-2 in a World Cup Group H thriller on Monday, keeping the West African in contention for a place in the round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ghana edge S. Korea at WC in five-goal thriller

headlines.description: A late Casemiro winner helped Brazil to a 1-0 victory over Switzerland on Monday, sending them through to the knockout stages of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil into last 16 with late win vs. Switzerland

headlines.description: Bruno Fernandes scored a pair of goals as Portugal beat Uruguay to move to six points in Group H at Lusail Iconic Stadium in Qatar on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes leads Portugal past Uruguay into last 16

headlines.description: Kalidou Koulibaly's second-half strike earned Senegal a 2-1 win against Ecuador that sent the African team into the last 16 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Koulibaly strike sends Senegal into last 16

headlines.description: Cody Gakpo and Frenkie de Jong scored as the Netherlands beat hosts Qatar 2-0 on Tuesday to finish top of World Cup Group A.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands top group after easy win over Qatar

headlines.description: The United States advanced to the knockout stage of the 2022 World Cup, beating Iran 1-0 to book a last-16 matchup against the Netherlands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic fires US into WC last 16 with win vs. Iran

headlines.description: Goals from Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden helped England to a 3-0 win vs. Wales on Tuesday and a place in the knockout stage of the 2022 World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: England ease past Wales, secure WC last 16 spot

headlines.description: Australia reached the World Cup last 16 for the first time since 2006 after Mathew Leckie earned them a shock 1-0 win against Denmark.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia shock Denmark to reach WC knockouts

headlines.description: French-born Wahbi Khazri scored the only goal of the game as Tunisia upset World Cup holders France 1-0 at the Education City Stadium on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tunisia upset France but eliminated from WC

headlines.description: Argentina turned in a dominant display to beat Poland at the World Cup to win Group C and advance to the last 16 at Stadium 974 in Qatar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Argentina dominate Poland to win Group C

headlines.description: Mexico exited the World Cup after missing out on a place in the last 16 to Poland on goal difference, despite beating Saudi Arabia 2-1.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico exit WC on goal difference despite win

headlines.description: Two first-half goals set Morocco on their way to top spot in World Cup Group F but they had to hold on for a 2-1 win over Canada.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco top Group F with win over Canada

headlines.description: Belgium were knocked out of the World Cup after a poor 0-0 draw against Croatia on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium out of WC, Croatia advance after draw

headlines.description: A Kai Havertz double led Germany to a 4-2 victory over Costa Rica on Thursday, but it wasn't enough to avoid elimination at the 2022 World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Germany out of World Cup despite beating Ticos

headlines.description: — Japan scored twice early in the second half to come from behind to defeat Spain 2-1 and advance to the round of 16 of the World Cup on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan beats Spain 2-1 at World Cup

headlines.description: Uruguay secured a 2-0 win over Ghana but both nations were dumped out of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Uruguay beat Ghana but both KO'd out of WC

headlines.description: South Korea scored a remarkable stoppage-time winner against Portugal to secure their progress to the knockout rounds in improbable fashion.
headlines.shortLinkText: South Korea into round of 16 on last-gasp winner

headlines.description: Cameroon defeated a second-string Brazil team 1-0 in their final Group G match but it was not enough to advance to the World Cup knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cameroon beat group-winners Brazil but exit WC

headlines.description: Switzerland powered past Serbia 3-2 in their final World Cup Group G match on Friday to advance to the round of16 for the third straight time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Swiss beat Serbia in thriller to reach round of 16

headlines.description: The United States crashed out of the World Cup on Saturday after suffering a 3-1 defeat against the Netherlands in the round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT out of World Cup after round-of-16 loss

headlines.description: Lionel Messi spearheaded Argentina's charge to the World Cup quarterfinals after helping to secure a 2-1 victory against Australia on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi leads Argentina to WC QF, Australia KO'd

headlines.description: Goals from Olivier Giroud and Kylian Mbappe secured France a place in the World Cup quarterfinals on Sunday with a convincing 3-1 win over Poland.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe double earns France quarterfinal spot

headlines.description: England turned on the class after a testing start to handily beat Senegal at the 2022 World Cup and advance to the quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: England beat Senegal to set up clash with France

headlines.description: Croatia progressed into the World Cup quarterfinals after winning a penalty shootout over Japan on Monday following a hard-fought 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia edge Japan on pens in WC last 16

headlines.description: — It was the same old Neymar out there, looking fit and scoring a goal to move closer to Pelé’s all-time record and lead Brazil into the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Neymar scores, Brazil advances to quarterfinals at World Cup

headlines.description: Morocco stunned Spain with a penalty shootout win to reach the World Cup quarterfinals after playing to a 0-0 draw on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco stun Spain on pens to reach WC last 8

headlines.description: Goncalo Ramos netted a hat trick in his first World Cup start as Portugal stormed into the quarterfinals with a 6-1 win over Switzerland on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ramos hits hat trick as Portugal rout Swiss

headlines.description: — Neymar is again going home without a World Cup title. Luka Modric's quest continues unabated.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia beats Brazil on penalties in World Cup quarterfinals

headlines.description: — Lionel Messi started the match by delivering another soccer clinic. The Argentina superstar ended it sporting a bloodied top lip, shouting abuse to opponents and even blasting the referee.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Argentina beat Netherlands on penalties at World Cup

headlines.description: Morocco became the first African nation to reach a World Cup semifinal as they stunned Portugal with a 1-0 win thanks to a Youssef En-Nesyri header.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco first African team to reach WC semis

headlines.description: Harry Kane missed a late penalty as England crashed out of the World Cup quarterfinals with a 2-1 defeat to reigning champions France.
headlines.shortLinkText: France beat England after late Kane penalty miss

headlines.description: — Lionel Messi bent over, clutched his left hamstring and appeared to grimace, immediately spreading panic through the soccer world but especially among all Argentines.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Argentina beat Croatia 3-0 to reach World Cup final

headlines.description: France beat Morocco 2-0 in the semifinals of the World Cup at the Al Bayt Stadium on Wednesday night to end the African side's dream run in Qatar.
headlines.shortLinkText: France end Morocco's run, set up Argentina final

headlines.description: Croatia claimed a narrow 2-1 victory over Morocco on Saturday to ensure a third-place finish at the World Cup in Qatar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia beat Morocco to claim third place at WC

headlines.description: — Lionel Messi, wearing a black Qatari robe over his blue-and-white Argentina shirt, kissed the World Cup, shuffled toward his teammates and hoisted the golden trophy high in the air.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi wins World Cup, Argentina beats France on penalties
